relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Paul writes from the promise of life in Messiah.
Timothy receives grace, mercy, and peace.
Prayer remembers Timothy night and day.
Longing and tears are held toward joy.
Sincere trust flows through Lois and Eunice into Timothy.
The gift is rekindled like a living flame.
Spirit gives power, love, and soundness, not fear.
Do not be ashamed; share the good-news hardship by Divine power.
Saving and calling arise from grace and purpose.
Messiah brings life and incorruptibility to light.
Paul is appointed herald, apostle, and teacher.
Trust knows the One able to guard the deposit.
Healthy words are held in trust and love.
The beautiful deposit is guarded through indwelling Spirit.
He searches eagerly and finds him.
Mercy is prayed over his faithful service.

contemplative_note: 2 Timothy 1 is gift rekindling: ancestral trust, Spirit courage, healthy words, and the beautiful deposit guarded in love.
